#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 23 2003 at 9:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) for one this item really sucks it would rock it if were like a range slot or something but a head slot with only 19 ac and saves thats crapy i would take a deepwater helm over that any time

This is All/All. On a leather class, 18 AC plus saves is fairly nice.

▲ Page top
Two Sets of Gear
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2001 at 4:21 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I don't know about most of you but as a chanter I carry two sets of gear with me wearever I go.

One is my AC suit for hunting, hooking me up with 711AC without this item. The other set is resist gear that lets me feel comfortable in ToV with average of 150 on Fire/Cold/Magic without my friendly Druid or Bard help. Poisen/Disease well I have a few things that are nice and work great.

Good Hunting

▲ Page top
Circlet
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2001 at 1:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768079570
1 post
Many have argued this circlet is better than king Tranix crown as it gives more ac and overall more resistances. Since its all/all and a weight of .6 its truly something good for any class. IF a Tranix Crown goes for around 20k then this is worth about 25k. 5k is way out of wack for this item.
▲ Page top
RE: Circlet
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2001 at 2:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756994911
64 posts
Yes this is much better then the Tirex crown, Which currently is going for 10k+. Never seen one sold, but probablly 20k by my hardened EC eyes.
▲ Page top
RE: Circlet
QuoteReply

Hmmm
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2001 at 8:06 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750271495
122 posts
Now this is a good item, im not saying it isnt. But, to get this item u have to kill a lvl 50+ mob or do a quest that requires what is thought to be drops from DN. For my money and time i would rather have a CFK. 6 less ac but 11 more FR and 20 more CR. MR is important but 9 isnt so much compared to 20 CR on CFK. Just my 2 cp.
▲ Page top
Tallon / Vallon
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2001 at 6:30 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Check it out. The Circlet of Tallon has Saves vs Cold Poison and Magic. It is also No Drop.

This one is sort of the opposite of that one. Neat!

# Jan 20 2001 at 6:17 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Only one problem... 99% of the people able to get this item are gonna be way past L52. Good for Talendor, I guess... It's not no drop, but it is very rare whether you kill the mob or do the quest, so you will not see this item for sale much.
▲ Page top
RE: my rating
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2002 at 8:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
This dropped on a guild raid, and while many were past 52, a couple were below that, and even as low as me at 45. (I badly wanted tihs but lost the roll! Even without the saves, 18ac on such a light item would be nice for a monk.) Not saying you can solo this huy below 52, but if you're on a guild raid this guy isn't out of your league below 52, assuming you have good support.

Edited, Sun Oct 6 09:00:26 2002
▲ Page top
RE: my rating
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 5:59 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1594570556750
57 posts
There are dragonkin also at Temple of Veeshan and many other places. Like for example WW. This is nice resists if You dont have specific resist gear per type. And in many places mobs use more than 1 type of attacks. It's a welcome plus for everyone under 150 - 200 resists.
▲ Page top
Intentional or coincidence?
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2001 at 1:28 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This would be a very decent PvP item on Vallon Zek, with the resists and all. =)
▲ Page top
RE: Intentional or coincidence?
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2001 at 3:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245820293
24 posts
Also on Tallon Zek as well.

On Tallon, the darks have decided to gain faction with the giants, and leave the dorf city to the other teams. Sometimes, I do have to ask why...
▲ Page top
RE: Intentional or coincidence?
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2001 at 6:18 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Hehe, that's the same way on Vallon. Dorfs are owned by the lights and Giants are owned by the Darks. Oddly enough, the Dragons are befriended by the cross-teamers. It all worked out pretty nicely.

Just to let you know, you get the Circlet by killing the prophet, but you can also get it by completing one of his quests, apparently.
▲ Page top
RE: Intentional or coincidence?
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2001 at 3:20 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous

# Jan 12 2001 at 2:05 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Why do people feel the need to insult others on here? Maybe it would not be the absolute best for a Nagafen raid, but why call the guy an idiot. Seriously, I am not trying to flame you, but at least this guy put forth an effort to try and help people. And what's up with not leaving a name?

Anyway, this item would go for some good money to a monk. 18 ac is much better than a Tranix crown, and it has MR which the Froglok King crown does not have. Very nice item.
